Hey, take a power nap if you need one. Look, I don't like long naps. And when I take a nap in the end of it, you know, take power naps if they help you. A lot of people talk about, I'm gonna take a quick 20 minute, 30 minute nap, quick pop it, take a real get a little rim state going, and it's gonna help me. Some people it helps, some people it doesn't, it makes you feel good, good, do it, okay? But look, a nap don't mean you tuck in, okay? A nap is on top the bed or on the sofa with a little blanket. And ain't you getting all snuggled in? Power naps don't include getting underneath the covers, all right? Take a quick power nap, 15 minutes, 16 minutes, 12 minutes, if it gets you recharged. Try that.
